decision_reason: Clean A2, R:R 2.45 PASS, sole blocker contraction_quality 49.39<50. DEFER not promote: contraction_quality is a daily-close metric computed AFTER the Day-2 entry window, so promote-if-firms>=50 is not confirmable on a buy-stop fill; modest 1.81x Day-1 volume is weak thrust; +56pct above 200SMA nears the extension line. Re-test on a Day-2 bar showing tightening contraction AND volume expansion. Playbook-only; SLINGSHOT family zero resolved outcomes.

A2 route but slingshot_range_break=FALSE and contraction 40.72<50 - mechanical slingshot never confirmed. +99.8pct above 200SMA is severe extension without reset, a HARD rule and more stretched than the SPIR row cancelled at +75pct. Relabeling to a momentum/MB breakout to authorize it is the forbidden extension loophole. R:R 3.20 does not rescue a no-reset chase into a 52wk-high with round-number 95 overhead. CANCEL the current entry; can re-qualify only after a multi-week reset. Playbook-only.

B+ C1; structure OK (range_break TRUE, contraction 50.28, vol 3.10x) but R:R 1.60 FAILS the 2.0 floor on a wide 8.12pct stop. Only path to 2.0R is tightening the stop on a Day-2 pullback - not executable (cannot tighten a stop on an unprinted bar; needs inside bar AND trigger>76.63 in sequence). Weakest Day-1 close (73pct) and most extended (+115.8pct above 200SMA, severe extension). CANCEL; degrade to plain B watch at best. Playbook-only.
